title: gtk3 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.24.43-4]
- Stop relying on xpms in the testsuite
  Resolves: RHEL-69453
- Avoid criticals on headless systems
  Resolves: RHEL-40884
- Hide emoji chooser unless explicitly requested
  Resolves: RHEL-65214
full_text:
[3.24.43-4]
- Stop relying on xpms in the testsuite
  Resolves: RHEL-69453
- Avoid criticals on headless systems
  Resolves: RHEL-40884
- Hide emoji chooser unless explicitly requested
  Resolves: RHEL-65214
